name: HSat2_HSat3_classical_satellite_architecture
description: Architectural archetype: human classical satellites HSat2 and HSat3. AT-rich pentamer-based tandem arrays forming the bulk of pericentric heterochromatin (C-band) on chr1q12, chr9q12, chr16q11.2 and Yq12. HSat2 monomers are CATTC-rich and HSat3 are ATTCC-rich; the two often co-occur in interleaved blocks.

architecture.internal_structure: HSat2: CATTC/GGAAT pentamer-based, ~26-bp consensus, AT-rich (~75% AT); HSat3: ATTCC-based, related architecture, slightly different pentamer composition; both form blocks of 1-30 Mb; population-level size polymorphism (qh+/qh-); fully resolved only in T2T-CHM13.
